description: Read-only template metadata for planning the trusted Collect and Exit key-door-exit scenario; execution remains owned by existing local scenario/runtime smokes.
validationHints: Use existing trusted local scenario/runtime smoke commands for execution.
Record generated evidence under ignored runs/ or temp output roots only.
boundary: Declarative read-only scenario template metadata only; no executable scripts, no command hooks, no network references, no source mutation hooks, no trusted writes.
